title: Jose Mourinho FC juniors take 2 out of 3
description: FOOTBALL NEWS - Jose Mourinho FC of...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"FOOTBALL NEWS - Jose Mourinho FC of uMasizakhe emerged as the overall winners of the Junior League Championships played last weekend at uMasizakhe Stadium. The DBNLM Local Football Association held the championships for the fourth time since 2021.","html":"FOOTBALL NEWS - Jose Mourinho FC of uMasizakhe emerged as the overall winners of the Junior League Championships played last weekend at uMasizakhe Stadium. The DBNLM Local Football Association held the championships for the fourth time since 2021."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Jose Mourinho took first position in the u.15 and u.11 age groups and Dangerous Darkies came first in the u.13 group."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Eleven junior clubs took part and enjoyed the football championship from Friday until late Saturday afternoon.","html":"Eleven junior clubs took part and enjoyed the football championship from Friday until late Saturday afternoon."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"Everything went as planned and everyone was happy with the programme. Next season we are planning to do it even better for everyone in the communities of Dr Beyers Naudé Local Municipality,\" said the junior league coordinator, Khwezi Xalisa.","html":"\"Everything went as planned and everyone was happy with the programme. Next season we are planning to do it even better for everyone in the communities of Dr Beyers Naudé Local Municipality,\" said the junior league coordinator, Khwezi Xalisa."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The junior league will start again in January."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"u.11:","html":"u.11:"},{"type":"list","items":["1st Jose Mourinho FC","2nd Birds United FC","3rd XI Attacker FC"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"u.13:","html":"u.13:"},{"type":"list","items":["1st Dangerous Darkies FC","2nd Portugal Birds FC","3rd Jose Mourinho FC"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"u.15:","html":"u.15:"},{"type":"list","items":["1st Jose Mourinho FC","2nd Shooting Stars FC","3rd Super Stars FC"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Proud Champions, the captains of Jose Mourinho, Ibenathi Smith (Vice) and Aviyonke Jaftha.","html":"Proud Champions, the captains of Jose Mourinho, Ibenathi Smith (Vice) and Aviyonke Jaftha."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Coach Khwesta hands over the trophy and medals to Portugal Birds for their u.13 second place.","html":"Coach Khwesta hands over the trophy and medals to Portugal Birds for their u.13 second place."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Coaches discuss the games at the table displaying the trophies.","html":"Coaches discuss the games at the table displaying the trophies."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
